pass1_value.note: API tokens are created in the Apify Console (Account → API tokens) with no mention of manual approval; pricing shows a Free plan, indicating developers can obtain and use tokens on a free tier subject to quotas.

final_value.note: Official docs show API tokens can be created directly in Apify Console (Settings → Integrations → API tokens), indicating self-serve credential issuance without manual approval.

pass1_value.note: Public REST API docs exist and API tokens can be self-generated on the Free plan, so integrations can be built immediately.

final_value.note: Public REST API docs exist (API v2), and official docs confirm API tokens can be created self-serve in the Apify Console, so integrations can be built immediately.
